titleStmt.title: SII 38.446: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 446. (A.R. No. 446 of 1912.) KŌṬṬŪR, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the north base, central shrine, Koḻundēśvara temple.

summary.p: Much damaged. Records a gift of 60 kāśu by Tiruttuṟaippichchāran Nambiyāruran Śilambaṇindāṉ Vēdavaṉam-uḍaiyāṉ alias Tirumāḷigaipichchar, a pontiff of the maṭha (maṭhapati) of the temple at Tirutuṟaippūṇḍi in Vaṇḍāḻaivēḷūr-kūṟṟam for burning a lamp. The priests of the temple (names given) received the gift and agreed to measure out oil for the said purpose at the temple in Kōṭṭūr in Nenmali-nāḍu, a (sub-division) of Rājēndrachōḷa-vaḷānāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu Irājendracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu neṉmali nāṭṭu koṭṭur Uṭaiya bra stā k koyil
l kāśyaman tillaikkūttanmuṭikoṇṭāḷu navana p paṭṭan Uḷḷiṭṭārum Entampi panmāheśvarapaṭṭaṉum gauta vantiyāṉa kuṇavatiśvarapaṭṭaṉum kāśyapaṉ kaḷicaṉāṉa tirucciṟṟa
mpa ṭaiyān nampiyān nilamā tirukaṇṭapaṭṭaṉum kokācari tirumulaṭṭāna mutalāna nāyaka paṭṭaṉum kāśyapan taruṇentracekaran cuntarapaṭṭaṉuḷḷiṭṭārum kaucikaṉ tirumulaṭṭāṉaṉ Uyyavantāṉāṉa Aimpattiruva
pa kāttā n tampirān toḻaṉum Ivvaṉaivom Innāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻai veḷurk kūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār tiruttuṟaippūṇṭi Uṭaiyār Ik koyilil maṭapati tiruttuṟaippiccāraṉ nampiyār UranRead nampiyārurancilampaṇintāṉ vetavaṉamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tirumāḷikaippiccar pakkal
nāṅkaḷ Upaiyaṅkoṇṭa kācuaṟupatum māka vaṉta Eṇṇaikku nāṅkaḷ nā� kācu nerāka kaikkoṇṭu Oru tirunantāviḷakku cantirātittavaṟ cāśva
tamāka Erikka kaṭavomānom Ivvaṉaivom Innāyanār Read nampiyāruran
Digital edition of SII 38.446 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
